reference: For the past three days, I have been feeling a bubbly or moving sensation in my lower right abdominal area. I have taken two pregnancy tests, and they both came up negative. I already have two children, and there are no other signs of being pregnant. However, the feeling I am experiencing is reminiscent of a baby moving. I can even place my hand on it and feel it move. I have no discomfort, just a constant movement. I also show no signs of being gassy or having indigestion.
text: For the past three days, I have been feeling a bubbly or moving sensation in my lower right abdominal area. I have taken two pregnancy tests and they both came out negative. I already have two children and there are no other signs of being pregnant. However, the feeling I am experiencing is reminiscent of a baby moving. I can even place my hand on it and feel it move. I have no discomfort, just a constant movement. I also show no signs of being gassy or having indigestion.
